no: EE UI Tweaks v2.2 by AncientCowboy, Lefreut, and contributors. Modular collection of 59 UI tweaks — pick and choose. Many lefreut-branded components are incompatible with LeUI skins (they FORBID LeUI if detected). Also incompatible with Infinity UI for most components. Can install pre-EET or post-EET. cn:1020 uses ACTION_READLN which blocks automated installation.

conflicts.reason: Lefreut's skin conflicts with EEUITweaks Main Component; utility tweaks are compatible
conflicts.myComps: #1080 Portrait Picker #1090 #1091 CharGen #2020 Message Box #2040 Level Up Glow #2060 Dialog Box #2110 Keep Dialog #2900 Record Screen #3020 #3023 #3024 #3070 Journal #3028 #3030 Customize #3040-3045 Identify #3050 #3051 Inventory #4005 #4006 #4000 #4010 #4020 #4025 Store #5000 Tooltip #5030 Scroll #5040 #5041 Fonts

conflicts.reason: These specific EEUITweaks components FORBID LeUI-SoD (LeUI already includes their features). Other EEUITweaks components are compatible. WeiDU auto-skips the incompatible components if LeUI-SoD is detected. Safe to have both in preset — conflicting components simply won't install.
conflicts.myComps: #1080 Portrait Picker #1090 #1091 CharGen Screens #2020 Message Box Resize #2040 Level Up Glow #2060 Dialog Box #2110 Keep Dialog #2900 Record Screen #3020 #3023 #3024 #3070 Journal #3028 #3030 Customize #3040-3045 Identify Items #3050 #3051 Inventory #4005 #4006 #4000 #4010 #4020 #4025 Store Tweaks #5000 Tooltip Scroll #5030 Scroll Bar #5040 #5041 Fonts

conflicts.reason: Lefreut's skin conflicts with EEUITweaks lefreut-branded components; utility tweaks are compatible. WeiDU auto-skips incompatible components.
conflicts.myComps: #1080 Portrait Picker #1090 #1091 CharGen #2020 Message Box #2040 Level Up Glow #2060 Dialog Box #2110 Keep Dialog #2900 Record Screen #3020 #3023 #3024 #3070 Journal #3028 #3030 Customize #3040-3045 Identify #3050 #3051 Inventory #4005 #4006 #4000 #4010 #4020 #4025 Store #5000 Tooltip #5030 Scroll #5040 #5041 Fonts

conflicts.reason: Most EEUITweaks lefreut-branded components are incompatible with Infinity UI. Utility tweaks (Mods Options, Quick Loot, etc.) are compatible.
conflicts.myComps: #1090 #1091 CharGen #2020 Message Box #2040 Level Up Glow #2060 Dialog Box #2110 Keep Dialog #2900 Record Screen #3020 #3023 #3024 #3070 Journal #3028 #3030 Customize #3040-3045 Identify #3050 #3051 Inventory #4005 #4006 #4000 #4010 #4020 #4025 Store #5000 Tooltip #5030 Scroll #5040 #5041 Fonts

conflicts.reason: EET GUI conflicts with these EEUITweaks components
Both expose hidden engine options. EEUITweaks #1010 is redundant if A7 Hidden Gameplay Options is installed.

dependencies.reason: Some chargen and store components require EET GUI's SoD-style menus

sum: Collection of 58 individual UI tweaks you can pick and choose from: hidden tooltip options, dialog tweaks, inventory changes, and quality-of-life improvements.

co.no: Adds a 'Mods' button to the options screen for configuring mod settings in-game. Incompatible with LeUI-SoD.
Exposes hidden engine options (debug mode, extra combat info, etc.) in the gameplay options menu. Redundant if using A7 Hidden Gameplay Options — prefer that mod instead.
v Lefreut's Chargen Button Layout — Default button positioning in character creation screens. Incompatible with LeUI, Infinity UI, and EET GUI.
Reversed (swapped) button positioning in character creation screens. Incompatible with LeUI, Infinity UI, and EET GUI.
WARNING: Uses ACTION_READLN for portrait picker input — blocks automated (unattended) installation. Generates random player characters at chargen.
v Portrait Selectors — Allows selecting from multiple portrait sets during character creation. Works out of the box. Incompatible with full UI overhauls.
Portrait picker that auto-scales portraits to fit. Requires Mr2150's portrait setup files.
Portrait picker without auto-scaling — portraits must be pre-sized. Requires Mr2150's portrait setup files.
Lefreut's portrait selection UI for character creation. Incompatible with LeUI skins and EET GUI.
Creates a backup of M_BG.lua before portrait picker modifications. Safety net for Mr2150's portrait tools.
Updates portrait references in Mr2150's portrait picker system.
Reveals hidden character generation options (races, classes, alignments) that the engine supports but the UI hides. Incompatible with full UI overhauls.

Automatically rerolls ability scores until a configurable minimum total is reached. QoL for players who would manually reroll hundreds of times anyway. Incompatible with Talents of Faerun ability score components.

Moves ability score rolling to the beginning of character creation instead of the end. Speeds up rerolling — you see stats before committing to class/race. Incompatible with Talents of Faerun ability score components.
Shows maximum proficiency point limits in the proficiency selection screen. May display oddly with Talents of Faerun's proficiency system. Incompatible with LeUI-SoD.
Makes the game world sidebars (left/right panels) transparent. Incompatible with LeUI-SoD.
v Feedback Message Box Resizers — Adds resize buttons to the combat feedback message box.
Adds a resize button to the feedback message box (Adul's implementation). Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Improved quick loot panel — easier item pickup from containers and corpses. Incompatible with LeUI-SoD.

co.n: lefreut's Level Up Glow with no Click
co.no: v Level Up Indicators — Portrait glow effect when a character can level up, no click needed. May appear under mouse cursor when pressing E key. Incompatible with LeUI and Dragonspear UI++.
co.tp2n: lefreut's Level Up Glow no Click

co.n: lefreut's Level Up Glow with Click
co.no: Portrait glow effect when a character can level up, requires click to dismiss.
co.tp2n: lefreut's Level Up Glow with Click

co.no: Adds dedicated level-up buttons to character portraits instead of glow effects.
Restores the dialog box style from EE patch 1.3. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Centers the dialog box on screen with a simple layout.
Adds a permanent thieving mode toggle button to the action bar — no need to keep re-selecting thieving abilities.
Simplifies CLUA console area teleportation commands. Debug/cheat utility.

co.n: lefreut's Keep Dialog Box active after death
co.no: Keeps the dialog box visible even after party leader dies mid-conversation. A7 Hidden Gameplay Options has a similar but broader option — prefer that if installed.
co.tp2n: lefreut's Keep Dialog Box active after death

co.no: Enables the CLUA debug console on mobile/tablet platforms. Not relevant for desktop installs.
Makes the dialog box respond to mouse clicks for easier interaction.
Enhanced character record screen layout. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Modifies the XP progress bars shown on character portraits to be more informative.
Additional configuration options for the leveling progress bars display.
v Journal Fixes — Fixes journal display bugs and layout issues (Mr2150's version). Compatible with lefreut's journal fixes.
Improved journal with quest entries expanded by default. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Improved journal with quest entries collapsed by default. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Lightweight journal bug fixes without full journal overhaul. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Improved character customization screens (colors, sounds, scripts). Compatible with Mr2150's journal fixes. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Allows customizing ALL party members (not just your own characters). Incompatible with LeUI skins.
v Auto-Identify Cost — Free item identification. Choose one cost option.
v Lefreut's Improved Inventory — Enhanced inventory screen with item stat comparison tooltip when hovering equipped items. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Enhanced inventory screen without the item comparison tooltip.
v Lefreut's Store Button Layout — Default store button positioning. Incompatible with LeUI, Infinity UI, and EET GUI.
Reversed store button positioning. Incompatible with LeUI, Infinity UI, and EET GUI.
Default store screen improvements. Incompatible with Infinity UI and LeUI skins.
co.tp2n: Joined Store Panels Using lefreut's Solution

co.no: Allows stealing multiple items in a single thieving attempt instead of one at a time. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Streamlines the selling process at stores — faster item sales with fewer clicks. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Extends store menu item lists to fill the full screen height. Incompatible with LeUI and LeUI-SoD.
v Spellbook Overhaul — Redesigned spellbook interface. Incompatible with LeUI skins and SubtleD's Improved Identify. May conflict with Talents of Faerun.
Restores classic-style spellbook layout. Incompatible with SubtleD's Improved Identify. May conflict with Talents of Faerun.
Adds scrolling to tooltips that overflow the screen. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
Overrides the dialog box (Box 5) rendering with lefreut's custom layout.
Replaces scroll bar styling throughout the UI. Incompatible with LeUI skins.
v Lefreut's Improved Fonts — Changes item/spell description text from italicized to non-italicized for readability.
Restores the original BG2 font style for item/spell descriptions.

advisories.reason: EEUITweaks cn:1060 (Roll First) and cn:1070 (Auto-Roller) modify chargen ability score UI which may conflict with ToF cn:80000/80001 (Ability Score Modifiers) and cn:80100 (Point-Buy Stats) that replace the score system with Lua. EEUITweaks cn:1100 (Display max proficiency limits) may display oddly with ToF cn:81100 (Revised Weapon Proficiency) which externalizes proficiencies to Lua. All are soft conflicts — they may coexist but UI may look wrong. None of these EEUITweaks components are in the Ultimate preset.
advisories.myComps: #1060 Roll First #1070 Auto-Roller #1100 Display max proficiency limits
advisories.theirComps: #80000 #80001 Ability Score Modifiers #80100 Point-Buy Stats #81100 Revised Weapon Proficiency
